zh.Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Ba: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Abigail Fowler於1646年3月1日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德溫莎女爵時，她的父親Ambrose Fowler Sr.22歲，母親Joane Alford23歲。她於1671年3月22日與Increase Sikes I在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1733年6月19日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾哈普登享年87歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Abigail Fowler于1646年3月1日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德溫莎女爵时，她的父亲Ambrose Fowler Sr.22岁，母亲Joane Alford23岁。她于1671年3月22日与Increase Sikes I在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1733年6月19日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾哈普登享年87岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Fowler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a fowler, a hunter or trapper of wild birds (a common medieval occupation), from Middle English fogheler, fugheler (Old English fugelere, a derivative of fugol ‘bird’).

nameMeanings.name: Abigail
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘father of exaltation’ in Hebrew, borne by one of King David's wives, who had earlier been married to Nabal (1 Samuel 25:3), and by the mother of Absalom's captain Amasa (2 Samuel 1:25). The name first came into general use in Britain in the 16th century, under Puritan influence. It was a common name in literature for a lady's maid, for example in  Beaumont  and  Fletcher's  play The Scornful Lady (  1616 ). The biblical Abigail refers to herself as ‘thy servant’ in addressing King David. In Ireland this name has traditionally been used as an Anglicized form of Gobnat , although the reasons for this are not clear. It was popular in the 17th century, especially among Puritans and Nonconformists, and has again enjoyed considerable favour since the 1990s.

variants.name: Abbigail
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘father of exaltation’ in Hebrew, borne by one of King David's wives, who had earlier been married to Nabal (1 Samuel 25:3), and by the mother of Absalom's captain Amasa (2 Samuel 1:25). The name first came into general use in Britain in the 16th century, under Puritan influence. It was a common name in literature for a lady's maid, for example in  Beaumont  and  Fletcher's  play The Scornful Lady (  1616 ). The biblical Abigail refers to herself as ‘thy servant’ in addressing King David. In Ireland this name has traditionally been used as an Anglicized form of Gobnat , although the reasons for this are not clear. It was popular in the 17th century, especially among Puritans and Nonconformists, and has again enjoyed considerable favour since the 1990s.

variants.name: Abigaile
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘father of exaltation’ in Hebrew, borne by one of King David's wives, who had earlier been married to Nabal (1 Samuel 25:3), and by the mother of Absalom's captain Amasa (2 Samuel 1:25). The name first came into general use in Britain in the 16th century, under Puritan influence. It was a common name in literature for a lady's maid, for example in  Beaumont  and  Fletcher's  play The Scornful Lady (  1616 ). The biblical Abigail refers to herself as ‘thy servant’ in addressing King David. In Ireland this name has traditionally been used as an Anglicized form of Gobnat , although the reasons for this are not clear. It was popular in the 17th century, especially among Puritans and Nonconformists, and has again enjoyed considerable favour since the 1990s.

historicEvents.description: The first three settlers were: Henry Denslow 1663, Nathaniel Gaylord-1678, and Abraham Dibble - 1708.

en.lifeSummary: When Abigail Fowler was born on 1 March 1646, in Windsor, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Ambrose Fowler Sr., was 22 and her mother, Joane Alford, was 23. She married Increase Sikes I on 22 March 1671, in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 19 June 1733, in Hampden, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 87, and was buried in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Abigail Fowler est née le 1 mars 1646, à Windsor, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Ambrose Fowler Sr., avait 22 ans et sa mère, Joane Alford, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Increase Sikes I le 22 mars 1671, à Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 juin 1733, à Hampden, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterrée à Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Abigail Fowler am 1. März 1646 in Windsor, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ambrose Fowler Sr. 22 und ihre Mutter Joane Alford 23. Sie hat am 22. März 1671 in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Increase Sikes I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. Juni 1733 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Hampden, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Abigail Fowler è nata il il 1 marzo 1646 nel Windsor, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Ambrose Fowler Sr., aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Joane Alford, aveva 23 anni. ja.lifeSummary: Abigail Fowlerが1646年3月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウィンドソルで生まれた時，父Ambrose Fowler Sr.は22歳，母Joane Alfordは23歳であった。1671年3月22日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドでIncrease Sikes Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1733年6月19日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアハンプデンで87歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Ba: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드
ko.lifeSummary: Abigail Fowler(이)가 1646년 3월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 윈드소르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ambrose Fowler Sr.(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joane Alford(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1671년 3월 22일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드에서 Increase Sikes I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1733년 6월 19일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 함p든에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Abigail Fowler nasceu em 1 de março de 1646, em Windsor, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, Ambrose Fowler Sr., tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Joane Alford, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Increase Sikes I em 22 de março de 1671, em Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de junho de 1733, em Hampden, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 87 anos, e foi sepultada em Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Abigail Fowler родилась 1 марта 1646 г. в местности виндзор, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Ambrose Fowler Sr. было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Joane Alford, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Increase Sikes I 22 марта 1671 г. в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 19 июня 1733 г. в местности хампден, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 87 лет и была похоронена в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Abigail Fowler nació el 1 de marzo de 1646, en Windsor, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Ambrose Fowler Sr., tenía 22 años y su mamá, Joane Alford, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Increase Sikes I el 22 de marzo de 1671, en Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 19 de junio de 1733, en Hampden, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 87 años, y fue sepultada en Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
